svg.text: Activation console · what's on, what's gated, what's off

g.text: L3 = review-all · L4 = auto-merge ≥ threshold · L5 = dark factory (full Tuesday-morning scenario)
all 4 repos currently have NO branch protection on main · auto-merge would land force-pushes if enabled
Engine git_integration.py already refuses force-push internally · branch protection adds defence-in-depth at the GitHub layer
instant stop · do not require redeploy
events that auto-spawn pipelines · per-trigger rate limits enforced (webhooks.py)
+ Add trigger · GitHub event · scheduled · custom HTTP
branch protection · 3/3 repos exposed · enable to promote L5
